scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w @note/api" "npm run dev -w @note/web"
scripts.dev:portless: concurrently -n api,web -c magenta,cyan "portless api.notecms -- npm run dev -w @note/api" "cross-env VITE_USE_GRAPHQL_PROXY=true NOTECMS_PORTLESS_API=https://api.notecms.localhost portless web.notecms -- npm run dev:portless -w @note/web"
scripts.dev:full: npm run dev:db && npm run dev
scripts.dev:full:portless: npm run dev:db && npm run dev:portless
